## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like, including any API design ideas or usage examples.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references to JMAP RFCs, or related issues.
